item.title: From all of us here in the EU:
item.description: Can't say I'm surprised, and honestly, no nation should be led by people that old. That said, Biden seemed like a decent human being, unlike the alternative in the other camp. Hope you guys sort it out.

item.title: Guy love
item.dc:creator: athomeplayer

item.title: Get to know your neighbors
item.description:
Some neighbors are the best, some aren't. You'll never know till you get to know them.
I, myself, have wonderful neighbors and we all look out for each other. I would trust any of them to watch my son if I had to and that is a reassuring feeling.
item.dc:creator: Herebychoice

item.title: Unholy Sunday Stolen Dump of Chaotic Memes
item.description:
1. It's going well, I can see
2. The best defense is offense
3. Haters will say this is faked in some way
4. Customer service
5. Yeah, what's up with that?!
6
7. The Grindset is strong here
8. As it was written
9. A happy man
10. What genre would give up to live in a mansion? (Also I'm picturing FBI agent being on you 24/7 and the moment you decided to listen to rap, they kick you out of the mansion)
11. Excuse me sir, but you're in my seat
12. That's how he sleeps
13. Rump shaker
14. To everyone who scrolled trough this dump, you deserve the clapping seal gang
15. And finally I would like to share with you some footage of a wacky "Stanley Parable"-inspired game that I'm currently developing. If you liked the humor in this dump, I'm pretty sure the game is for you! Here as a full novel that I put in the game that I got a ghost writer to write. It will change the way you look at life and your inner self! Anyway, please wishlist, as small indie devs can't do it without good natured people like you: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse/
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames

item.title: Images of Note: Solar Panels and trains are cool
item.description:
We all know why.
The deep frying war between Scotland and the South takes a deep fried dark turn.
So fun fact, Eric came in and he was really sad for some reason. we don't know why but I hope he's better now
It's got more fucks than a porno
spin
Brazil's opinion on Acre seems to be "we don't know what's over there and we're too scared to find out.
sel
:)
y e s
do not separate them
one of the few near future predictions that Star Trek makes that isn't war related is that we're going to put solar panels on everything and I think that's very cool and a very good idea.
I will bare that in mind
check up on the funny friend
PAIGE NO
My whole motivation of playing stardew was to save Leo.
http://discord.abbii.gay: For Chats http://twitch.abbii.gay: For Stream (m/w/f around 1830 UK time) http://tumblr.abbii.gay: For shitposts http://mastodon.abbii.gay: For microblogging

item.title: Capitalism versus social democracy
item.description: 3 years ago I swapped jobs to one where I work from home 75%+ of the time and it’s made a huge improvement on my quality of life. Even when I am not working from home, I’m on the road and my commutes are short.

item.dc:creator: LoopStricken

item.title: WHY I'M VOTING FOR BIDEN: It's the greed, stupid....
item.description: Fueled by near 0 percent interest rates that reigned for 14 years from 2008 to 2022, and supercharged by the federal Bush tax cuts of 2001 and 2003 (which were maintained by the Obama administration) and the Trump tax cuts of 2017 (which also slashed the capital gains tax and lowered the income tax hit taken by the richest 1 percent of earners), America has seen its share of billionaires actually grow in recent years: The collective net worth of America’s 748 billionaires reached $5 trillion in September 2023, an increase of $2.2 trillion, or 77 percent, since the Trump-GOP tax law went into effect in 2018. The inequality generated by the COVID-19 pandemic only added to the disparity. By mid-2022, 573 people became new billionaires during the pandemic, at the rate of one every 30 hours, according to Oxfam International, a nonprofit. Paying something more in taxes wouldn't hurt them one bit. Under the Eisenhower (ACTUAL REPULICAN PRESIDENT), , the corporate tax rate ranged from 30 to 52%, according to the Tax Foundation's historical data on U.S. federal corporate income taxes. Like the current federal income tax, corporate taxes during Eisenhower's time followed a graduated model where tax rates increased as income did. From 1952 to 1963, a span that encompasses Eisenhower's entire presidency, IRS historical data confirms the tax rate was 30% for the first $25,000 in profits that a company made, and 52% for anything over that amount. Billionaires in the U.S. pay a smaller tax rate than most teachers and retail workers. Thanks to a tax code that favors income from wealth over income from work—and a slew of tax-avoidance strategies—the richest among us end up paying a smaller percentage of their income to the federal government than most working families. --------- FACTS: U.S. billionaires are 46 percent, or $1.6 trillion, richer than they were in 2020. According to a 2021 White House study, the wealthiest 400 billionaire families in the U.S. paid an average federal individual tax rate of just 8.2 percent. For comparison, the average American taxpayer in the same year paid 13 percent. According to leaked tax returns highlighted in a ProPublica investigation, the 25 richest Americans paid $13.6 billion in taxes from 2014-2018—a “true” tax rate of just 3.4 percent on $401 billion of income. SOURCES: https://www.oxfamamerica.org/explore/stories/do-the-rich-pay-their-fair-share/ ---------- https://www.usatoday.com/story/news/factcheck/2022/05/09/fact-check-viral-post-exaggerates-tax-rates-under-eisenhower/9588111002/ #EatTheRich
item.dc:creator: doxydad1

item.title: Have you played with your hedgehog today?
item.description: Time for a nap.
item.dc:creator: Herebychoice

item.title: Love this outfit, and her message!
item.description:
This is Yasmin Benoit.
She identifies as goth and asexual.
When people think of "goth girls" or "goth boys", it's usually a milky pale person. Yasmin wants the world to remember that people of all races love the deep, dark intensity of goth culture. Have a read of this great op-ed she wrote all about the subject: https://metro.co.uk/2020/05/22/goths-come-shapes-colours-12744513/ Most Viral Edit: support your local goths! Especially in this heat!
item.dc:creator: Bjr4life

item.title: A dump of older Favorites.
item.description:
Me.
But also me...
JUSTICE! (Kiki's Delivery Service, and that bitch getting served with her grandma's herring pie.)
I love shit like this. I know it's a trick, you even get to watch them change size, and it STILL fucks with my brain.
item.dc:creator: Onlyhereforthelaughs

item.title: I'm feeling powerless. I doubt this'll change anyone's mind. Maybe it changes just one?
item.description: It'll get down voted. At least I tried Edit: holy shit, I honestly thought this was going to die in usersub. Please go vote. Make sure everyone you know understands the impact it'll have on you. Accept that there are going to be uncomfortable conversations and a loss of friends and family. While I encourage you to keep fighting, have an exit strategy set up. Things won't go holocaust overnight. But it will inevitably go that way. Make sure you aren't caught off guard when it does.
item.dc:creator: Wrongclusterbdisorderbutgooff

item.title: Now that Biden has stepped down, I think it's only fair to say ...
item.description: Thank you, Joe, for your hard work and dedication. There's an instant fondness for Joe Biden in my heart now, and I instantly only remember the good things he's done like student-debt relief, the CHIPS act, infrastructure. Joe Biden is a hero. Now let's go win this thing for him.
item.dc:creator: majortool

item.title: I made a tracker for Alien RPG
item.description:
Five most comman stats and resources, plus a slider for panic level. Made from acrylic, some pla parts, magnets, and a steel rod.
Fits normal size IDs through a slot in the top and has a hook for a lanyard
Here's how it slides in
Swappable dials!
Here was my first draft. I'll probably return and make this again but fix some things I addressed with Big Chap above. I like the small format of this one and it uses less materials overall - would be good to offer both.
item.dc:creator: Frostycopper
